title: Resolution authorizing Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon, Honorable Vice mayor Marlo PJ A. Alipon, Municipal Administrator Atty. Virgilio A. Tiongson, Jr. and Municipal Treasurer Maria Luisa G.
